transcript.final_response:
Generated `/release/CHANGELOG.md`:

```markdown
# Changelog

## Features
- auth: add OAuth2 support
- ui: dark mode toggle
- api: add pagination support
- db: add connection pooling

## Bug Fixes
- api: handle null response body
- auth: token refresh race condition
- ui: button alignment on mobile
- api: correct status code for 404

## Other
- deps: update lodash to 4.17.21
- readme: update install instructions
```
tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /release
if [[ ! -f /data/commits.log ]]; then echo 'Missing /data/commits.log' >&2; exit 1; fi
features=()
fixes=()
others=()
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
  if [[ "$line" =~ ^([^\(]+)\(([^\)]*)\):[[:space:]]*(.*)$ ]]; then
    type="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    scope="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
    msg="${BASH_REMATCH[3]}"
    item="- ${scope}: ${msg}"
    case "$type" in
      feat) features+=("$item") ;;
      fix) fixes+=("$item") ;;
      *) others+=("$item") ;;
    esac
  fi
done < /data/commits.log
{
  echo "# Changelog"
  echo
  echo "## Features"
  for item in "${features[@]}"; do echo "$item"; done
  echo
  echo "## Bug Fixes"
  for item in "${fixes[@]}"; do echo "$item"; done
  echo
  echo "## Other"
  for item in "${others[@]}"; do echo "$item"; done
} > /release/CHANGELOG.md
cat /release/CHANGELOG.md

line='feat(auth): add OAuth2 support'
if [[ "$line" =~ ^([^\(]+)\(([^\)]*)\):[[:space:]]*(.*)$ ]]; then echo yes ${BASH_REMATCH[1]} ${BASH_REMATCH[2]} "${BASH_REMATCH[3]}"; else echo no; fi
if [[ "$line" =~ ^([^(]+)\(([^)]*)\):[[:space:]]*(.*)$ ]]; then echo yes2 ${BASH_REMATCH[1]} ${BASH_REMATCH[2]} "${BASH_REMATCH[3]}"; else echo no2; fi

line='feat(auth): add OAuth2 support'
regex='^([^()]*)\(([^)]*)\):[[:space:]]*(.*)$'
if [[ $line =~ $regex ]]; then declare -p BASH_REMATCH; else echo no; fi

    case "$type" in

done < /data/commits.log

  echo
